title: Build interfaces faster with a personal component library
subtitle: Ready-made buttons, inputs, background patterns and icons in one place for product work, portfolio cases and rapid prototypes.

items.buttonsDesc: Primary, ghost, outline, loading and accent variants.
items.inputsDesc: Text inputs, forms, validation and error states.
items.backgroundsDesc: Gradients, grids, glow effects and decorative patterns.

problemSolution.title: Templates should speed up work, not get lost across projects
problemSolution.subtitle: When UI solutions are scattered across repositories, you spend time rebuilding things you already solved.

problem.title: Problem
problem.description: Duplicated components, lost patterns and slower starts for new tasks.

solution.title: Solution
solution.description: One personal template library with fast access, search and reliable reuse.

community.title: Anyone can submit a solution that helps others ship faster
community.subtitle: Users share ideas and ready templates, and the strongest contributions expand the library.

finalCta.title: Start building your own UI library today
